title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Jaswant Singh Gill, a mining engineer, leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Maseeha
subTitle: Krishna, a victim of the local gangster Surajbhan's atrocities, joins forces with Shiva, whose parents were killed upon Surajbhan's orders, and resolves to bring him down.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Kabzaa
subTitle: Ravi works for Veljibhai Soda, a gangster, and does illegal work for him. Once, he is asked to vacate Ali from his property, but he gets inspired by his ideals and decides to change his ways.

title: Jodi No. 1
subTitle: Two friends, Jai and Veeru hatch a clever plot to deceive Rai Bahadur and rob him. However, their plans take an unexpected turn when they fall in love with Rai Bahadur's daughters.

title: Vanvaas
subTitle: After being abandoned by his sons, an elderly father grappling with dementia embarks on a life-changing journey. He is aided by a cunning thief who is determined to reunite him with his family.

title: Pardes
subTitle: Kishorilal wants an Indian bride for his NRI son; he gets him engaged to Ganga, his friend's daughter. However, she seems to share a deeper bond with Arjun, Kishorilal's foster son.

title: Loafer
subTitle: Ravi, an unemployed man who constantly gets into fights, is framed for the murder of a gangster. With no support from his family, he must now fight to prove his innocence.

title: Loha
subTitle: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

title: Vijaypath
subTitle: When a criminal is sentenced to death by Saxena, the gangster's brother, takes revenge by killing the judge's family and his driver. Later, the driver's son embarks on a vengeful quest.

title: Vijaypath
subTitle: When a criminal is sentenced to death by Saxena, the gangster's brother, takes revenge by killing the judge's family and his driver. Later, the driver's son embarks on a vengeful quest.

title: Mr. Bond
subTitle: Mr Bond is a detective known for solving the toughest of crime mysteries. But the arrival of Dragon, a gangster involved in child-trafficking, seems to be a real challenge for the crime-solver.

title: Aao Pyar Karen
subTitle: Just like his father, Raja wants to marry for love. He falls for Chhaya, a house help, but Anjali, his grandmother, is against their match.

title: Ru-Ba-Ru
subTitle: Tara and Nikhil are in a relationship and the former wants to take their relationship to the next step. However, Nikhil's work ambitions poses challenges for them.

title: Chamku
subTitle: Chandrama is adopted by a Naxal leader and grows up to be a Naxalite. However, when his adoptive father is killed, he is forced to become a police assassin and later, falls in love with Shubhi.

title: Sanam
subTitle: Amid the grim shadows of cross-border terrorism in India, love shines bright, guiding troubled army man Gaurav and village belle Sanam towards each other.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
subTitle: Separated at birth, Kishen and Kanhaiya grow up in different worlds, one in opulent luxury, the other in poverty. Fate reunites them as they fight together to end injustice.

title: Avtaar
subTitle: Avtaar leads a happy life with his wife, Radha, and his sons, Chander and Ramesh. However, consumed by their greed and ambitions, Avtaar's sons betray him but he soon reaches new heights of success.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Mard
subTitle: Azad, a wealthy prosperous king, is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer who wants to take over his kingdom. Years later, Azad's son comes to his father's rescue and puts an end to Dyer's tyranny.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Baaghi: A Rebel for Love
subTitle: The son of a colonel falls in love with a young woman from a brothel. However, their love soon becomes synonymous with rebellion because of social taboos.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: Apaharan
subTitle: Ajay, an aspiring policeman, borrows money from a moneylender to pursue his dream. However, he is unable to repay the loan on time and decides to be a part of a kidnapping scheme.

title: Dil Aashna Hai
subTitle: Laila, a cabaret dancer who grew up in a brothel, gets a call from her dying mother divulging that she was adopted. So, she takes the help of her lover, Karan, in finding out who her real parents are.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
subTitle: After graduating from a university in India, an unemployed man decides to try his luck in New York and gets caught in a love triangle between an equally unlucky girl and a rich girl.

title: Aakhree Raasta
subTitle: A man is falsely accused of his wife's murder and imprisoned. When he sets out to seek revenge, he finds a police officer on his trail who turns out to be his own son.

title: Mr. India
subTitle: Hoping to make the world a better place for orphaned children, a compassionate street musician takes on a power-hungry crime boss with the help of a cloaking device.

title: Singh Is Kinng
subTitle: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.
